candidate_check.description: Internet connection sharing must be disabled.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding:

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Network Connections\

Value Name: NC_ShowSharedAccessUI

Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 0x00000000 (0)
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Network >> Network Connections >> "Prohibit use of Internet Connection Sharing on your DNS domain network" to "Enabled".
title: Internet connection sharing must be disabled.
